title: euphorbia greenwayi subsp. greenwayi
intro: Euphorbia greenwayi subsp. greenwayi, also known as the Greenway's candelabra euphorbia, is a species of succulent plant in the spurge family Euphorbiaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Euphorbia greenwayi subsp. greenwayi include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems such as asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a decoction, which can be used to treat various ailments, or by drying the plant material to create a powder that can be used in teas or capsules.
